name: Ranch Style Chicken Fried Steak and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------
GRAVY:
4 tablespoons Fat
1 quart Milk
4 tablespoons Unbleached Flour
Tenderize the round steak. Dip in milk and then flour, salt, and pepper to taste. Fry in deep fat at approximately 375 Degrees F until golden brown. After the steak is done, pour off the fat, leaving about 4 tablespoons in the pan. Add 4 tablespoons flour. Stir until smooth. Add 1 quart milk. Stir and cook until thickened for steak gravy.
